behavior_contract_limitations: current delivery policy is spawned_subagents_required and does not allow role_simulation degradation
real spawned subagents are available in this session but orchestration must still fail closed if unavailable in future sessions unless policy explicitly allows degradation

change_requests.description: Expanded V1.1 scenario/test coverage traceability without changing product scope after spawned test coverage review blockers.

non_ui_behavior_limitations: current delivery policy is spawned_subagents_required and does not allow role_simulation degradation
real spawned subagents are available in this session but orchestration must still fail closed if unavailable in future sessions unless policy explicitly allows degradation

behavior_evidence_candidates: BP-V11-001 scenario review orchestration builds role prompts and records deliberation
BP-V11-002 test coverage review checks traceability and item-level planned assertions
BP-V11-003 test implementation review checks real test code and execution evidence
BP-V11-004 role_simulation is rejected under spawned_subagents_required and requires policy allowance plus explicit user acceptance otherwise
BP-V11-005 blocked_with_reason fails closed and preserves visible reason
BP-V11-006 legacy state remains readable without satisfying new split gates
BP-V11-007 package output carries V1.1 orchestration rules
BP-V11-008 status-only, Open Spec/progress summary, and custom-only review claims cannot satisfy review gates
BP-V11-009 non-UI pre-handoff requires test_coverage and pre-closure requires test_implementation
BP-V11-010 release and Product Delivery closure remain not eligible before implementation, executed tests, and formal closure evidence exist
negative_boundary_candidates: NB-V11-001 do not merge scenario, test coverage, and test implementation gates
NB-V11-002 do not treat role_simulation as strong evidence
NB-V11-003 do not allow chat summaries, session logs, status-only claims, Open Spec summaries, progress records, or custom gate artifacts to replace review artifacts
NB-V11-004 do not introduce dashboard or external workflow integration in V1.1
NB-V11-005 do not create standalone Runtime API versioning for V1.1
NB-V11-006 do not mark release or closure passed before implementation and tests run
NB-V11-007 do not accept role_simulation under spawned_subagents_required policy

non_ui_behavior_contract.contract_name: V1.1 Multi-Agent Review Orchestration Behavior Contract
entry_points: build review orchestration profile for scenario review
build review orchestration profile for test coverage review
build review orchestration profile for test implementation review
derive pre-handoff and pre-closure blockers from Product Delivery state
generate packaged skill and template text for V1.1 review orchestration
inputs: planned behavior obligations and coverage audit records
executed test evidence and closure inputs when reviewing implementation
review mode policy and user confirmation records
limitations: current delivery policy is spawned_subagents_required and does not allow role_simulation degradation
real spawned subagents are available in this session but orchestration must still fail closed if unavailable in future sessions unless policy explicitly allows degradation
negative_boundary_records: NB-V11-001 do not merge scenario, test coverage, and test implementation gates
NB-V11-002 do not treat role_simulation as strong evidence
NB-V11-003 do not allow chat summaries, session logs, status-only claims, Open Spec summaries, progress records, or custom gate artifacts to replace review artifacts
NB-V11-004 do not introduce dashboard or external workflow integration in V1.1
NB-V11-005 do not create standalone Runtime API versioning for V1.1
NB-V11-006 do not mark release or closure passed before implementation and tests run
NB-V11-007 do not accept role_simulation under spawned_subagents_required policy
outputs: blocked_with_reason result when evidence is unavailable or blockers remain

boundary_conditions: legacy generic test review remains readable but cannot satisfy split gates
missing review_mode defaults to spawned_subagents for legacy compatibility only
new V1.1 accepted artifacts must record review_mode explicitly
existing V1.0.11 artifacts remain supporting evidence unless revalidated
status-only, Open Spec/progress summaries, and custom gate artifacts remain supporting evidence only
no dashboard, external integration, or standalone Runtime API versioning
exceptions: role_simulation without both policy allowance and explicit user acceptance
status-only or custom-only review completion claim
inputs_outputs: Open Spec, scenario matrix, behavior contract, obligations, evidence, review mode input
prompt payloads, review artifacts, state entries, blockers, package text output
long_tasks: multi-round subagent deliberation may exceed a single response window
full regression and packaging verification runs after implementation
permissions: do not start implementation before Product Delivery gates pass
do not accept role_simulation under spawned_subagents_required policy
do not replace structured artifacts with chat summaries, session logs, status-only claims, Open Spec summaries, progress records, or custom gate artifacts
recovery: fail closed without mutating closure status
retry real spawned subagents when transport or capacity fails
request user acceptance only after degradation policy is explicitly enabled
keep role_simulation blocked under spawned_subagents_required policy
re-run validation after fixing missing fields or blockers
state_transitions: scenario matrix draft ready to scenario review passed
scenario review passed to user confirmed freeze
planned obligations ready to test coverage review passed
implementation evidence ready to test implementation review passed
review blocked to blocked_with_reason without closure mutation

rows.journey: Lead requests scenario review and receives independent positions, challenges, revisions, adjudication, and blockers
rows.negative_boundary: chat, session, status-only, Open Spec/progress summary, or custom artifact cannot replace structured scenario review artifact
rows.user_story: US-V11-001 build scenario review orchestration with fixed reviewers

rows.journey: QA checks US/J/SC/AC/TASK/TC mapping, collection coverage, and executable assertions
rows.negative_boundary: legacy generic test review, scenario review, status-only claim, or custom artifact cannot satisfy test_coverage gate
rows.user_story: US-V11-002 review planned test coverage before implementation authorization

rows.journey: QA checks real test code paths, execution evidence paths, reviewed test IDs, and verified action assertions
rows.negative_boundary: marker-only, first-button-only, status-only, or custom-only evidence cannot satisfy implementation review
rows.user_story: US-V11-003 review implemented tests before formal closure

rows.journey: Role simulation is requested and rejected under spawned_subagents_required; it can pass only in a future degradation-allowed policy with explicit user acceptance
rows.negative_boundary: role_simulation cannot be silently promoted to spawned_subagents evidence and cannot pass in this current policy
rows.user_story: US-V11-004 explicitly control degraded review mode

rows.journey: Maintainer loads legacy review state, verifies split gates remain authoritative, and packages V1.1 rules
rows.negative_boundary: V1.1 metadata must not make V1.0.11 artifacts unreadable or stronger than recorded
rows.user_story: US-V11-005 preserve compatibility and package rules

rows.journey: Release owner sees TASKs not started and tests not run, so release remains Draft / Not Released
rows.negative_boundary: do not mark release or closure passed before implementation, tests, and formal closure evidence
rows.user_story: US-V11-006 keep release and closure blocked until evidence exists

rows.journey: Gatekeeper derives non-UI pre-handoff and pre-closure blockers and rejects missing or substituted split review artifacts
rows.negative_boundary: generic test, wrong split review, status-only claim, or custom artifact cannot clear non-UI split gates
rows.user_story: US-V11-007 enforce non-UI split review authority

rows.journey: Maintainer verifies blocked_with_reason, role_simulation, dashboard/external/API non-goals, and non-UI behavior terminology remain explicit in package text
rows.negative_boundary: blocked_with_reason, role_simulation under spawned_subagents_required, dashboard/external integration, or standalone Runtime API scope cannot pass V1.1 gates
rows.user_story: US-V11-008 preserve review-mode and scope boundaries

open_spec_freeze.user_message: 确认冻结当前 V1.1 scenario package 和 TC-001..TC-026 测试覆盖设计
